mapper.select: select g.id , g.goods_type_id , gt.type_name,goods_name , price , brand , shelves , img from goods g left join goods_type gt on g.goods_type_id = gt.id

select g.id , g.goods_type_id , gt.type_name,goods_name , price , brand , shelves , img from goods g left join goods_type gt on g.goods_type_id = gt.id where g.goods_name like concat('%',#{searchTxt},'%') or gt.type_name like concat('%',#{searchTxt},'%') or g.brand like concat('%',#{searchTxt},'%')
